name: Thrill & Chill Zone - Family Fun Center
about: Thrill & Chill Zone is a comprehensive family entertainment center in New Town, offering a wide array of activities including a golf simulator. The facility operates Wednesday through Sunday from 3 PM to 9 PM, catering to various occasions like birthday parties, team celebrations, and casual visits. The venue is part of a larger development that includes significant site improvements, additional parking, and a modern utility setup, ensuring a comfortable and accessible environment for all guests.
why_golfers_like_it: Immersive golf simulator with famous courses for realistic gameplay
Convenient indoor setting for year-round practice and play
Part of a larger entertainment center with multiple activities available
Offers a fun and engaging atmosphere for golfers of all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Available at the Bar & Grill with delicious food options to recharge between activities.
No mention of alcohol service available on-site.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The provided information does not specify whether clubs are provided or if you need to bring your own. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site Bar & Grill, but it does not explicitly mention if outside food and drinks are permitted. Please check with the venue for their policy on outside items.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information about the duration of an 18-hole round. This would depend on the simulator's setup and the number of players in your group.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Thrill & Chill Zone is explicitly described as a family entertainment center with activities for all ages, making it a kid-friendly venue.
